name: Moroccan-Style Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Potatoes, scrubbed and cut into 3/4-inch chunks
2 cup Raw pumpkin or butternut squash, peeled and cut into 3/4-inch chunks
1 can Plum tomatoes with liquid, chopped (14 oz)
2 cup Chick peas, canned or well-cooked
1 cup Whole grain couscous (presteamed, cracked semolina)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large soup pot.
2. Add the onions and sauté over moderate heat until golden.
3. Add the potatoes, pumpkin or squash, carrots, tomatoes, and enough water to cover.
4. Bring to a boil, then add the seasonings and simmer over low heat, covered, for approximately 45 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
5. Add the chick peas and season to taste with salt and pepper.
6. Simmer over very low heat for another 15 minutes.
7. In an oven-proof bowl, place the couscous. Cover with two cups of boiling water, then cover the bowl and let stand for 15 minutes.
8. Fluff with a fork.
9. Place a small amount of the couscous in each soup bowl, then ladle the soup over it.
10. Serve at once.
